at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data

Class TermNode

  • java.lang.Object
    • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.Printable
      • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermNode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Cloneable

    public class TermNode
extends Printable
implements Cloneable
    A term node consists of a TermAtom and a Hedge.
    Author:
    Alexander Baumgartner

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  TermNode.TraverseCallBack
      This class may be used to traverse a term tree and execute an arbitrary operation on every node.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static TermAtom nullAtom 
      static Hedge nullHedge 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TermNode(TermAtom atom, Hedge hedge)
      Instantiates a new term node.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      TermNode apply(Map<Variable,TermNode> sigma)
      Applies a substitution recursively and returns the new TermNode.
      TermNode clone() 
      boolean equals(Object other) 
      TermAtom getAtom() 
      Hedge getHedge() 
      boolean isNullAtom()
      Tests whether the atom of this term node is the null atom.
      void print(Writer out) 
      void setAtom(TermAtom atom)
      Null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value.
      void setHedge(Hedge hedge)
      Null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value.
      TermNode substitute(Variable from, TermNode to)
      Substitutes one Variable by a TermNode recursively and returns the new TermNode.
      boolean traverse(TermNode.TraverseCallBack callBack)
      Traverses the term tree and executes the callback function at every node.

        toString

    • Field Detail

      • nullAtom

        public static final TermAtom nullAtom

      • nullHedge

        public static final Hedge nullHedge

    • Constructor Detail

      • TermNode

        public TermNode(TermAtom atom,
        Hedge hedge)
        Instantiates a new term node. null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value. So that no NullPointerException can occur.
        See Also:
        nullAtom, nullHedge

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        public TermNode apply(Map<Variable,TermNode> sigma)
        Applies a substitution recursively and returns the new TermNode.

           throws IOException

        print in class Printable

      • setAtom

        public void setAtom(TermAtom atom)
        Null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value. So that no NullPointerException can occur.
        See Also:
        nullAtom

      • setHedge

        public void setHedge(Hedge hedge)
        Null values are transformed to unique objects which represent the null value. So that no NullPointerException can occur.
        See Also:
        nullHedge

      • substitute

        public TermNode substitute(Variable from,
                  TermNode to)
        Substitutes one Variable by a TermNode recursively and returns the new TermNode.

      • traverse

        public boolean traverse(TermNode.TraverseCallBack callBack)
        Traverses the term tree and executes the callback function at every node.
